{{Quote|Hush, Chiba, stop being a pest.|Aron Peacebringer|<ref name="marvel53" />}}
'''Chiba''' was the pet of [[Aron Peacebringer]], a powerful [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] of the [[Calian Confederacy]], during the era of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. A large crocodilian creature, Chiba was often by Peacebringer's side in his palace on [[Shiva IV]].<ref name="marvel53" />
